data.body: Pass-1 llm-prompts overlay review of the `code-review-security.md` `outputs:` rename. Finding recorded (prompt/contract drift): renaming the declared `outputs:` from `code_review_findings` to `security_findings` breaks the parsed contract — no `security_findings` contract is registered (`code_review/contracts.py:120` only registers `code_review_findings`), and consumers/tests key on the old name (`tests/unit/test_code_review_scope_intent.py:175` etc. assert `p.outputs == "code_review_findings"`). The inline comment itself admits the schema still keys on the old name.
